transcription.text: Guess what? OnePlus One equals more of the greatest stories with Disney Plus and Hulu. Stories about vibrant collaboration, a dodgy family curse, even a compulsion to put things right. It's the best of both worlds, and we are just getting started. So when you watch, you'll say, oh yeah, I'm pumped. Please, someone make sense of it. Girl, I know. I'm obsessed with these stories. It's the best of the best together with Disney Plus Hulu. Disney Plus.
